local_updates: Thunder win Game 2 and tie the Western Conference Finals 1–1.
Game 3 moves to San Antonio on May 22 but watch-party traffic stays active around OKC.
The Wiz continues running at Civic Center through May 24.
GalaxyCon and Paseo Festival buildup increase Memorial Day weekend movement.
Downtown playoff watch parties continue creating Bricktown movement.
Late-May construction and weather continue adding friction.
weather_watch: Late May warm weather with scattered storms possible, potentially affecting outdoor and weekend events.
